name: Merge PDFs
description: Combine two or more PDFs into a single document. Supports URLs, base64, multipart uploads, and custom metadata.

fields.name: urls
fields.description: Array of PDF URLs to merge (2-25)

fields.name: files
fields.description: Array of base64-encoded PDFs to merge

fields.name: output_filename
fields.description: Custom filename for the merged PDF
